message: WMI-1 shared-state divergence (signal-set-unchecked): '__skb_ext_copy' sets signal field 'sk_buff.active_extensions', which a different component branches on to reinterpret the object — a candidate ungoverned signal. [mechanism:unchecked-signal-field-set;indicates=WMI-1] [mem:struct=sk_buff;field=active_extensions;offset=127] [oracle:assert=sk_buff.active_extensions stays within the domain its consumer's agreement governs;assume=producer sets active_extensions without enforcing the consumer's cross-field invariant]
